positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a celestial forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a grouping of stylized, bioluminescent flora and fauna – such as ornate glowing mushrooms, gracefully arched root systems, and floating spirit lanterns – arranged in a symmetrical, symmetrical vertical composition. The style should be neo-art nouveau combined with detailed etching and woodblock printing aesthetics. Use deep indigo, vibrant emerald green, and shimmering gold as the primary color palette. The composition must feature strong contrast between the solid black negative space (perfect for apparel printing) and the intricate, glowing details. Highly detailed line work, clean silhouettes, centered subject matter. Print on a seamless repeat pattern basis, suitable for fabric printing. Clean edges, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, cartoon, sketch, low detail, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, artifacts, gradients, realistic photograph, logos
